title: Keryx project sandbox policy
description: Optional project-level non-secret sandbox policy. Must never contain API key values.

extraMasks.description: Additional NAME@host[,host] specs merged as explicit masks. Values are never stored here.

allowedDomains.description: Optional allowlist domain hints for restricted network (product may merge with runtime profile).

tlsTerminate.description: Project preference when env unset; still subject to fail-closed mask+TLS rules.
